title: Argon Tableware Black Rectangular Serving Tray 45.5 x 35.5cm - Reusable Non Slip Rubberized Surface Platter for Food and Drinks - Heat Resistant Stackable Tray for Bars, Restaurants and Home Use
features: 🍽️ Non-Slip, Secure Design for Confident Serving - The Argon Tableware 45.5 x 35.5cm rectangular tray features a textured Rubberized surface that prevents dishes and glasses from sliding, ensuring safe, spill-free transport in any setting.

🔥 Durable, Heat-Resistant Construction - Made from strong, professional-grade plastic, this serving tray withstands heat and heavy use, allowing safe handling of hot foods straight from the kitchen—ideal for home or commercial service.

🧺 Ample Space for Food & Drinks - With generous 45.5cm x 35.5cm dimensions and a 2cm rim, this non-slip serving tray provides plenty of space for multiple plates, drinks, or appetisers—perfect for dinner parties, bars, and restaurants.

💪 Versatile for Home or Professional Use - Designed for all occasions, this rectangular tray suits both domestic and commercial environments. Perfect for hosts, caterers, and servers looking for reliable, non-slip serving solutions.

✨ Easy to Clean & Long-Lasting - Built for efficiency and convenience, this reusable tray is easy to wipe clean or place in the dishwasher. A durable, modern serving essential that blends safety, functionality, and sleek design.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to piñatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! Serving Trays By Argon Tableware Perfect for home use as well as professional pubs, bars and restaurants, this range of Non-Slip Serving Trays from Argon Tableware allows you to transport both food and drink from kitchen to dining table with confidence. The real selling point of this tray is the rubber surface on top, which offers exceptional resistance against slipping! If you're in the business of food and drink, the Argon Tableware range of Non-Slip Serving Trays is a must-have. Durable Plastic Serving Tray - Perfect for home and professional use Heat Resistant - Serve hot dishes fresh from the oven Non Slip Rubber Top Surface - Helps reduce slipping; transport crockery with confidence Stackable Design - For space-saving storage Easy to Clean - Wipe clean with a damp cloth Durable Plastic Serving Tray Perfect for home and professional use Heat Resistant Serve hot dishes fresh from the oven Non Slip Rubber Top Surface Helps reduce slipping; transport crockery with confidence Argon Tableware Rectangle Serving Tray - 65cm x 45cm Argon Tableware Rectangle Serving Tray - 55cm x 40cm Argon Tableware Rectangle Serving Tray - 50cm x 40cm Argon Tableware Rectangle Serving Tray - 45cm x 35cm Argon Tableware Rectangle Serving Tray - 40cm x 30cm Argon Tableware Rectangle Serving Tray - 35cm x 25cm Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 810 4.3 out of 5 stars 810 4.3 out of 5 stars 810 4.3 out of 5 stars 810 4.3 out of 5 stars 810 4.3 out of 5 stars 810 Price £15.99 £ 15 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 Diameter 65cm 55cm 50cm 45cm 40cm 35cm Depth 45cm 40cm 40cm 35cm 30cm 25cm Height 2cm 2cm 2cm 2cm 2cm 2cm
